chapter_title.ar: باب التَّسْمِيَةِ وَ التَّحْمِيدِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ عَلَى الطَّعَامِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 47 – The Naming (Bismillah), and the Praising (Al-Hamdulillah), and the supplication upon the meal

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/109)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/109)
text: كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا وُضِعَ الطَّعَامُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ قَالَ اللَّهُمَّ هَذَا مِنْ مَنِّكَ وَ فَضْلِكَ وَ عَطَائِكَ فَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَ سَوِّغْنَاهُ وَ ارْزُقْنَا خَلَفاً إِذَا أَكَلْنَاهُ وَ رُبَّ مُحْتَاجٍ إِلَيْهِ رَزَقْتَ فَأَحْسَنْتَ اللَّهُمَّ وَ اجْعَلْنَا مِنَ الشَّاكِرِينَ
فَإِذَا رُفِعَ الْخِوَانُ قَالَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي حَمَلَنَا فِي الْبَرِّ وَ الْبَحْرِ وَ رَزَقَنَا مِنَ الطَّيِّبَاتِ وَ فَضَّلَنَا عَلَى كَثِيرٍ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ تَفْضِيلًا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Muhammad Bin Abdullah, from Amro Al Mutattab, from Abu Yahya Al Sana’any,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>: ‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, whenever the meal was placed in front of him<sup>asws</sup>, said: ‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! This is from You<sup>azwj</sup>, and Your<sup>azwj</sup> Grace, and Your<sup>azwj</sup> Grant. Therefore, Bless for us in it, and Make it pleasant for us, and Sustain us afterwards when we have eaten it, those who are needy for it You<sup>azwj</sup> have Sustained them, so You<sup>azwj</sup> Favoured. O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and Make us to be from the grateful ones’.

So when the meal is raised, he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The Praise is for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Who Carried us in the land and the sea, and Sustained us from the good things, and Graced us upon abundance from His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures, with abundant Grace’.
en.sarwar: 12. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd Allah from ‘Amr al-Mutatabbib from abu Yahya al-San‘aniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, when finding food placed before him said, ‘O Lord, this is from You, from Your favor, generosity and gift. Make it a blessing for us and make it delicious for us, grant us favors in future when we finish it. Many are those who need it and You have made it available for them. O Lord, make us of those who appreciate favors.’ When the table had been taken away he (the Imam) said, ‘All praise belongs to Allah, who moves us on land and in the sea, has granted us fine sustenance and has given us preference over many of His creatures, a good preference.’”
